_comment: Console-only Serilog config-driven override (CONTEXT-10 B4). The programmatic .WriteTo.File(...) registration in HostBootstrap.cs is suppressed by an environment guard when ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Docker (PLAN-2.1 ID-23 fix), so containers log Console-only — operator code logs are captured via `docker logs`, NOT written into the container writable layer.
